items.example: It's a city with a rich history and modern architecture.
There's plenty of things to do in the city centre.
What I like about this city is the friendly atmosphere.
The best thing about living here is the transport system.

items.phrase: One thing I don't like is...
items.translation: Одна вещь, которая мне не нравится — это...
items.example: One thing I don't like is the traffic during rush hour.
Whether you like art or sports, this city has something for everyone.
